line: - The existing contract already had strong scale-out gating, but it needed a dedicated section making namespace binding, durable-truth consistency, and repair containment explicit before distribution can be treated as a serious direction.

items: The existing contract already had strong scale-out gating, but it needed a dedicated section making namespace binding, durable-truth consistency, and repair containment explicit before distribution can be treated as a serious direction.

line: - Distribution semantics in this repo must stay subordinate to single-node governance, explainability, and rebuildability rather than creating new hidden authorities.

items: Distribution semantics in this repo must stay subordinate to single-node governance, explainability, and rebuildability rather than creating new hidden authorities.

line: - Kept distribution explicitly evidence-gated and non-default.

line: - Defined namespace as the first execution boundary even under shard placement complexity.

line: - Declared authoritative state consistency stricter than derived-surface consistency.
